payload.title: Publish crates to crates.io
payload.description:
Get Trust crates on crates.io so 'cargo install trust' works.

Tasks:
- Blocked by RT-55 (metadata + license must land first).
- Decide initial version: 0.1.0 across the board, or pin per-crate? Default: 0.1.0 uniform.
- Publish order (deps first; cargo refuses to publish a crate whose deps aren't on the registry yet):
  1. trust-attrs, trust-diag, trust-std (leaves of the graph)
  2. trust-syntax (depends on trust-attrs?)
  3. trust-lower (depends on trust-syntax)
  4. trust-lints (depends on trust-syntax, trust-diag)
  5. trust-rustc, trust-rustdoc (depend on trust-lower)
  6. trust (depends on most of the above)
  7. trust-lsp (depends on trust-syntax + trust-lints)
  8. cargo-trust (if it exists; user-facing subcommand)
- Verify post-publish: in a scratch dir, 'cargo install trust' + 'trust check some_file.rs' works end to end.
- Document the bump-and-publish flow in scripts/release.sh or similar — bumping 9+ crates by hand is error-prone.

Edge case to watch: trust-rustc is a RUSTC_WRAPPER — publishing it works, but downstream users still need to set RUSTC_WRAPPER manually unless cargo-trust wraps it for them. Out of scope for this ticket (that's a feature ask), but flag in README.
